citations.text: r recent financial results reflect the success of these investments. In fiscal 2016, we achieved record Marketing Cloud revenue of $1.63 billion, which represents 20% year-over-year revenue growth. In December 2016, we acquired TubeMogul and we will integrate TubeMogul in our Digital Marketing business in the first quarter of fiscal 2017. We expect that the addition of TubeMogul and sustained demand across our portfolio of Marketing Cloud solutions will drive revenue growth in future years. Fina
